name: Blue Butterfly
description: The Blue Butterfly is a Tier 2 neutral creature that inhabits the park sky, especially around milkweed and taller weeds. It is graceful and calm, but a badly opened fight can drag several of them in at once.
behavior: It flies without much urgency, sometimes hovering in place before settling down to rest or feed. Its pattern feels calm, which makes the shift very noticeable once one of them becomes aggressive and the nearby group follows along.
interactionWithPlayer: It usually ignores the player until damaged. If you hit one too close to the group, several butterflies can pile in and turn a simple fight into a flurry of bodies that are harder to track than they first look.
interactionWithCreatures: Their relationship with other creatures is passive and they rarely seek fights on their own. Most of the time they only react after another nearby butterfly has already entered combat.
strategy: If you want their materials, the best approach is to break the group formation first. The real danger is not one butterfly, but letting several wake up at the same time and forcing yourself to read too many trajectories at once.

abilities.name: Divebomb Headbutt
abilities.description: It dives from the air and slams head-first into the target.

abilities.name: Combo Bite
abilities.description: A short bite chain used to keep pressure up.

abilities.name: Chilling Gust
abilities.description: Releases a chilling gust that applies cold buildup.
